result.stdout:
USAGE: paket.install.exe [--help] [--version <string>] [--feed <string>]
                         [--frameworks <string>] [--paket-path <string>]
                         [--enable-scripts] [--skip-gitignore] [--convert]
                         [--silent] [--verbose]

OPTIONS:

    --version <string>    specify paket version to install
    --feed <string>       specify nuget feed used to download paket bootstrapper
    --frameworks, -fw <string>
                          specify target .NET framework(s)
    --paket-path, -p <string>
                          the paket directory path
    --enable-scripts, -es enable script generation in paket.dependencies
    --skip-gitignore      skip .gitignore generation/modification
    --convert, -c         convert existing NuGet references
    --silent, -s          silent mode
    --verbose, -v         verbose output
    --help                display this list of options.
